mapper.select: SELECT u.USER_NO AS userNo, u.USER_TYPE AS userType, u.USER_CREATED_AT AS userCreatedAt, u.USER_UPDATED_AT AS userUpdatedAt, u.USER_STATUS AS userStatus, u.USER_NAME AS userName, u.USER_GENDER AS userGender, u.USER_PHONENUMBER AS userPhoneNumber, u.USER_REGISTRATION_NO AS userRegistrationNo, u.USER_NICKNAME AS userNickName, u.USER_PROFILE_IMG AS userProfileImg, ua2.USER_ADDRESS_NO AS userAddressNo, ua2.USER_ZIP_CODE AS userZipCode, ua2.USER_BASE_ADDRESS AS userBaseAddress, ua2.USER_DETAIL_ADDRESS AS userDetailAddress FROM USERS u JOIN USER_AUTHENTICATION ua ON ua.USER_NO = u.USER_NO LEFT JOIN USER_ADDRESS ua2 ON ua2.USER_NO = u.USER_NO WHERE ua.USER_AUTH_ID = #{value}

SELECT utm.MAPPING_NO, utm.USER_NO, utm.QUESTION_ID, utm.TAG_CODE, tm.TAG_NAME, tm.TAG_CATEGORY FROM USER_TAG_MAP utm JOIN USER_AUTHENTICATION ua ON ua.USER_NO = utm.USER_NO LEFT JOIN TAG_MASTER tm ON tm.TAG_CODE = utm.TAG_CODE WHERE ua.USER_AUTH_ID = #{value} ORDER BY tm.TAG_CATEGORY ASC, tm.TAG_NAME ASC, utm.MAPPING_NO ASC
SELECT TAG_CODE, TAG_NAME, TAG_CATEGORY FROM TAG_MASTER ORDER BY TAG_CATEGORY ASC, TAG_NAME ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_TAG_MAP ( MAPPING_NO, USER_NO, QUESTION_ID, TAG_CODE ) SELECT SEQ_USER_TAG_MAP_NO.NEXTVAL, ua.USER_NO, #{questionId}, #{tagCode} FROM USER_AUTHENTICATION ua WHERE ua.USER_AUTH_ID = #{authId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM USER_TAG_MAP utm WHERE utm.USER_NO = ua.USER_NO AND utm.TAG_CODE = #{tagCode} )
mapper.update: UPDATE USERS u SET u.USER_NICKNAME = #{userNickName}, u.USER_GENDER = CASE WHEN u.USER_GENDER IS NULL THEN NVL(#{userGender}, u.USER_GENDER) ELSE u.USER_GENDER END, u.USER_PHONENUMBER = #{userPhoneNumber}, u.USER_PROFILE_IMG = NVL(#{userProfileImg}, u.USER_PROFILE_IMG), u.USER_UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM USER_AUTHENTICATION ua WHERE ua.USER_NO = u.USER_NO AND ua.USER_AUTH_ID = #{authId} )

MERGE INTO USER_ADDRESS ua USING ( SELECT ua2.USER_NO AS userNo FROM USER_AUTHENTICATION ua2 WHERE ua2.USER_AUTH_ID = #{authId} ) src ON (ua.USER_NO = src.userNo) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ua.USER_ZIP_CODE = #{userZipCode}, ua.USER_BASE_ADDRESS = #{userBaseAddress}, ua.USER_DETAIL_ADDRESS = #{userDetailAddress} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( USER_ADDRESS_NO, USER_NO, USER_ZIP_CODE, USER_BASE_ADDRESS, USER_DETAIL_ADDRESS ) VALUES ( SEQ_USER_ADDRESS_NO.NEXTVAL, src.userNo, #{userZipCode}, #{userBaseAddress}, #{userDetailAddress} )
mapper.select: SELECT ua.USER_AUTH_PW FROM USER_AUTHENTICATION ua WHERE ua.USER_AUTH_ID = #{value}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_TAG_MAP ( MAPPING_NO, USER_NO, QUESTION_ID, TAG_CODE ) SELECT SEQ_USER_TAG_MAP_NO.NEXTVAL, #{userNo}, #{questionId}, #{tagCode} FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM USER_TAG_MAP utm WHERE utm.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND utm.TAG_CODE = #{tagCode} )
mapper.select: SELECT utm.MAPPING_NO, utm.USER_NO, utm.QUESTION_ID, utm.TAG_CODE, tm.TAG_NAME, tm.TAG_CATEGORY FROM USER_TAG_MAP utm LEFT JOIN TAG_MASTER tm ON tm.TAG_CODE = utm.TAG_CODE WHERE utm.USER_NO = #{value} ORDER BY tm.TAG_CATEGORY ASC, tm.TAG_NAME ASC, utm.MAPPING_NO ASC
SELECT A.QUESTION_ID, A.TAG_CODE, B.TAG_NAME, B.CATEGORY, FROM USER_TAG_MAP A JOIN TAG_MASTER B ON (A.TAG_CODE = B.TAG_CODE) WHERE A.USER_NO = #{userNo} ORDER BY A.QUESTION_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PLACE_INQUIRY ( INQUIRY_NO, USER_NO, INQUIRY_TYPE, INQUIRY_TITLE, INQUIRY_CONTENT, INQUIRY_EMAIL, INQUIRY_DATE, STATUS ) VALUES ( SEQ_INQUIRY_NO.NEXTVAL, #{userNo}, #{inquiryType}, #{inquiryTitle}, #{inquiryContent}, #{inquiryEmail}, SYSDATE, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT INQUIRY_NO, INQUIRY_TYPE, INQUIRY_TITLE, INQUIRY_CONTENT AS inquiryContent, INQUIRY_DATE, REPLY_CONTENT, REPLY_DATE, STATUS FROM PLACE_INQUIRY WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} ORDER BY INQUIRY_DATE DESC
SELECT INQUIRY_NO, INQUIRY_TYPE, INQUIRY_TITLE, INQUIRY_CONTENT, INQUIRY_EMAIL, INQUIRY_DATE, REPLY_CONTENT, REPLY_DATE, STATUS FROM PLACE_INQUIRY WHERE INQUIRY_NO = #{inquiryNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM PLACE_INQUIRY WHERE INQUIRY_NO = #{inquiryNo} AND STATUS = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE PLACE_INQUIRY SET INQUIRY_TYPE = #{inquiryType}, INQUIRY_TITLE = #{inquiryTitle}, INQUIRY_CONTENT = #{inquiryContent}, INQUIRY_EMAIL = #{inquiryEmail}, INQUIRY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE INQUIRY_NO = #{inquiryNo} AND STATUS = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT INQUIRY_NO AS inquiryNo, INQUIRY_TYPE AS inquiryType, INQUIRY_TITLE AS inquiryTitle, INQUIRY_CONTENT AS inquiryContent, INQUIRY_EMAIL AS inquiryEmail, STATUS AS status FROM PLACE_INQUIRY WHERE INQUIRY_NO = #{inquiryNo}
SELECT user_auth_email FROM User_Authentication WHERE user_auth_id = #{userAuthId}

SELECT ts.USER_NO, am_energy.RESULT_TEXT AS ENERGY_TEXT, am_plan.RESULT_TEXT AS PLAN_TEXT, am_place.RESULT_TEXT AS PLACE_TEXT, am_plan.RESULT_TEXT, ' ', am_place.RESULT_TEXT) (am_energy.RESULT_TEXT || ' ' || am_plan.RESULT_TEXT || ' ' || am_place.RESULT_TEXT) AS FINAL_FULL_SENTENCE FROM TRAVEL_STYLES ts LEFT JOIN TRAVEL_ANALYSIS_MASTER am_energy ON am_energy.CATEGORY = 'ENERGY' AND am_energy.COMBINATION_KEY = ts.Q9_ENERGY LEFT JOIN TRAVEL_ANALYSIS_MASTER am_plan ON am_plan.CATEGORY = 'PLAN' AND am_plan.COMBINATION_KEY = ts.Q2_PLAN LEFT JOIN TRAVEL_ANALYSIS_MASTER am_place ON am_place.CATEGORY = 'PLACE' AND am_place.COMBINATION_KEY = ts.Q1_PLACE WHERE ts.USER_NO = #{user_no}

SELECT LISTAGG(M.RESULT_TEXT, ' ') WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY DECODE(M.CATEGORY, 'INTENSITY', 1, 'PLANNING', 2, 'LOCATION', 3, 4) ASC ) result FROM TRAVEL_ANALYSIS_MASTER M JOIN ( SELECT CASE WHEN TAG_CODE = 'SPONTANEOUS_HIGH' THEN 'IMPROMPTU' WHEN TAG_CODE = 'DEPENDENT_STYLE' THEN 'DEPENDENT' WHEN TAG_CODE = 'INTENSITY_VERY_HIGH' THEN 'MAX_ENERGY' WHEN TAG_CODE = 'INTENSITY_HIGH' THEN 'HIGH_ENERGY' WHEN TAG_CODE = 'INTENSITY_LOW' THEN 'LOW_ENERGY' WHEN TAG_CODE = 'INTENSITY_VERY_LOW' THEN 'VERY_LOW' ELSE REGEXP_REPLACE(TAG_CODE, '^LOC_|^PLAN_|^MOVE_|^STAY_|^BUDGET_|^COMP_|^FOOD_|^PURPOSE_|^INTENSITY_|^MOOD_', '') END AS CLEAN_TAG, USER_NO FROM USER_TAG_MAP WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND QUESTION_ID IN (1, 2, 9) ) U ON 1=1 WHERE U.CLEAN_TAG LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', M.COMBINATION_KEY), '%') GROUP BY U.USER_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Travel_Styles ( STYLE_USER_NO, USER_NO, TRAVEL_IS_ANALYZDE, TRAVEL_ANALYZED_DATE, TRAVEL_TYPE_NAME ) VALUES ( SEQ_TRAVEL_STYLE.NEXTVAL, #{userNo}, 'Y', SYSDATE, #{travelTypeName} )
